message:
Fix scroll position persistence across navigation (#206)

The layout uses a <main> element with overflow-y-auto for scrolling,
not window scroll. Changed useLastRoute to target the <main> container
for both saving and restoring scroll positions. Also fixed a race
condition where navigating away and back would overwrite the saved
position with 0 before restore could read it — now saves position
on path-change cleanup instead of via a scroll event listener.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
